JANE DOE
Senior Software Engineer | London

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Experienced full-stack engineer with 5+ years building cloud-native applications.
Expert in AWS architecture, React frontend development, and modern JavaScript.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer — TechCorp (2021–present)
- Designed and deployed microservices on AWS Lambda and ECS
- Led React UI team, modernized legacy Vue codebase to React
- Wrote infrastructure-as-code using Terraform and CloudFormation
- Mentored junior developers in JavaScript best practices
- Containerized applications with Docker and orchestrated with Kubernetes

Software Engineer — StartupXYZ (2019–2021)
- Built real-time dashboards in React with Redux state management
- Developed RESTful APIs in Node.js
- Managed AWS S3, RDS, and CloudFront for production systems
- Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions

SKILLS
Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python
Frontend: React, Vue, HTML/CSS
Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, CloudFormation, Terraform)
Containerization: Docker, Kubernetes
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB
Tools: Git, GitHub, Webpack, Docker, npm

CERTIFICATIONS
AWS Solutions Architect Associate (2022)
Certified Kubernetes Administrator (2021)

EDUCATION
BSc Computer Science, University of Manchester (2019)
